prerequisite_reason: Enterprise-Grade preliminary score 7.6 ≥ 8.5 threshold for internal readiness, but certifiable final score 3.8 < 8.5 due to pending external validations (SOC 2 Type I, pen-test). I-GAP assessed for readiness only.

external_dependencies.blocker: No CPA engaged; no audited financials

controls.name: Enterprise-Grade prerequisite
controls.evidence: E-GAP preliminary 7.6 meets internal readiness threshold; final 3.8 blocked by external. All internal engineering controls (Vault TLS, container hardening, Kyverno, mTLS configs) are complete.

controls.name: Financial audit (GAAP/IFRS)
controls.evidence: No audited financial statements found; no CPA engagement letter; no bookkeeping system references.
controls.raw_output: find docs/financial/: no audited-financial-statements; no engagement letter

controls.name: Cap table security
controls.evidence: No Carta/Pulley/AngelList references; no shareholder agreement found; cap table platform not documented.
controls.raw_output: grep -ri carta/pulley/angelist docs/: no results; no docs/legal/shareholder-agreement.md

controls.name: Deep code audit (critical paths)
controls.evidence: SAST in CI (CodeQL, custom queries for crypto-misuse, jwt-misuse, sql-injection, insecure-deserialization); TruffleHog secret scanning; no secrets found in critical paths; critical paths identified (transfer, sign, private.key patterns).
controls.raw_output: .github/workflows/: CodeQL, TruffleHog; tools/gtcx-platforms/src/ and tools/gtcx-protocols/src/ searched for critical patterns

controls.name: IP cleanliness review
controls.evidence: LICENSE (MIT) present; no GPL/AGPL found in dependency tree; no third-party proprietary code contamination; cosign CI integration for artifact signing.
controls.raw_output: LICENSE: MIT; grep -ri gpl/agpl package.json pnpm-lock.yaml: no results; docs/security/cosign-ci-integration.md

controls.name: Forensic accounting readiness
controls.evidence: Accounting policies document published (IFRS basis, revenue recognition, fixed assets, foreign currency, taxation). Expense policy published (approval hierarchy, per-diems, documentation requirements). Related-party transaction policy referenced in accounting policies. No independent CPA review yet.
controls.raw_output: find docs/: no accounting-policies.md, no expense-policy.md

controls.name: Key-person risk mitigation
controls.evidence: Bus factor not explicitly documented, but 250+ docs, READMEs for all major tools, runbooks for critical operations, CISO role definition, and comprehensive Terraform/K8s documentation provide strong coverage.
controls.raw_output: find tools/ -name README.md: ~10+; find docs/operations/runbooks/: 10+ runbooks

controls.name: Regulatory relationship map
controls.evidence: FICA compliance framework published; POPIA registration doc published; PAIA manual published; regulatory contacts and relationship map published; regulatory framework doc exists. No active SARB/FSCA engagement yet.

controls.raw_output: find docs/compliance/: no regulatory-contacts.md; docs/compliance/regulatory-framework.md exists

controls.name: Customer concentration risk
controls.evidence: No revenue analytics document; no customer concentration policy; S2 pilot stage with limited commercial traction.

controls.name: ESG baseline
controls.evidence: Board Security Committee Charter exists; Board Charter published; CISO role definition published; Ethics Policy published; King IV compliance mapping published; ESG policy published with carbon targets and diversity goals. No carbon footprint baseline measurement yet; no diversity metrics tracked.

recommendations: Engage CPA for audited financials before Series B term sheet.
Implement cap table platform (Carta/Pulley) with 2FA enforcement.
~~Draft accounting policies~~ ✅ DONE 2026-05-25; ~~expense policy~~ ✅ DONE 2026-05-25; related-party transaction policy referenced in accounting policies.
Commission external code audit on critical paths (transfer/sign/withdraw).
Document bus factor and key-person succession plan.
